name: Convex
description: Monitor Convex projects, deployments, deploy keys, and team access for compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to https://dashboard.convex.dev/team/settings/access-tokens
2. Copy your Team ID (numeric)
3. Create or copy an Access Token
4. Enter both values above

credentialFields.label: Team Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Get from Convex Dashboard > Team Settings > Access Tokens

credentialFields.label: Team ID
credentialFields.helpText: Numeric team ID, found in Team Settings alongside your access token

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all Convex projects and their deployments to verify access and deployment inventory

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists all deployments across projects with type, status, and configuration details

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Audits deploy keys across all deployments to verify key management and access control
